title: A good way to make money - Make educational materials. New industry.

transcript.text: Hello, this video is a good way to make money.
It's a thing that I would like to make, I would do as a business if I had the time, if I was living in a house right now.
I would make, I will turn my world history timeline into a very pretty poster.
That I would then try to sell to schools in America.
The original idea was to just let people know about it so that they could print it up and put it together.
Schools in America have money.
And they might have enough money to make it worthwhile for you to just, or me, to just sell something that's prettier.
Because if you print that stuff up, it kind of looks like a mismatch of paper taped together.
But maybe you could print it with a professional printer.
And have it all one plastic laminated, built to last, color coded poster.
That you actually sell to a school.
And then just nail it up on the wall.
And then they just leave it there forever and they pay for it.
And then just reserve the thing that you print up with paper for third world countries.
Who only have the money to print up the paper and do it in black and white, you know.
So I would do that.
But if anybody else wants to do it, they're more than welcome to use mine.
I already mailed it to myself and patented it and everything.
So you can't, like, take it from me and make it so that I can't use it for myself.
But anybody's welcome to use that.
That'd be cool.
To, uh, it'd be a cool thing for a school to have.
And it may even be a cool way to make some money.
I don't know.
Or if you, like, own a copy place, you could make it.
So I just wanted to say that.
Okay.
Okay.
